default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, recent changes, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Darrell is leaving GrowthX; Kyle is stepping back in to ensure continuity](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Prophecy is shifting messaging to "AI data analysis" (95% certain), focusing on data teams and central data platform teams](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Content production and performance metrics are showing positive trends](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Prophecy Express, a new $50K package, is launching early next month with a focus on hands-on product trials](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Transitions

  - [Darrell Etherington is leaving GrowthX at the end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Kyle Gaudreau is stepping back in to ensure continuity](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Prophecy has undergone leadership changes, with Matt now directly overseeing Cody](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)

### Content Production and Performance

  - [5 new articles approved in ContentOS](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [5 articles finished and ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [4 articles staged and 4 published](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Sessions and views metrics showing positive upward trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Analytics as a team sport cluster starting to gain traction](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Prophecy Messaging and Focus

  - [Shifting from "AI native analytics and automation" to "AI data analysis" (95% certain)](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Focus remains on data teams and central data platform teams](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Not currently targeting business intelligence or specific business unit analysts](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Emphasis on data transformation over data prep](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Prophecy positioned as a critical foundation layer for data cleaning and preparation](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Upcoming Prophecy Initiatives

  - [Prophecy Express: New $50K package launching early next month](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Website migration from prophecy.io to prophecy.ai](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Potential future exploration of business unit-specific use cases and audiences](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Maintaining current audience focus (data professionals)](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Potential future topics on use cases and implications for marketing, revenue, and business ops](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Balancing educational content with specific data cleaning techniques and concepts](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cody to confirm 100% certainty on "AI data analysis" messaging shift](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Update knowledge base and content context if AI data analysis is confirmed](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Cody to provide updated timelines and context on recent changes](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Continue driving content production and monitoring performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Prepare for Prophecy Express launch and website migration](https://fathom.video/share/2AzUeEy42Jzh7Yy8pzqsBxnzTJSA6FfN?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

action_items.description: Ping Cody tmrw re 100% confirmation on "AI data analysis" messaging; if yes, update relevant content
